mapper.sql: alevel_question_mark_scheme_id, alevel_question_id, alevel_source_file_id, question_key, mark_value, answer_summary_text, mark_scheme_text, mark_scheme_html, mark_scheme_json, source_page_start, source_page_end, source_bbox_json, raw_excerpt_hash, match_status, match_confidence, grading_mode, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_question_mark_scheme WHERE alevel_question_mark_scheme_id = #{markSchemeId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_question_mark_scheme WHERE alevel_question_id = #{questionId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_question_mark_scheme_id ASC

SELECT FROM alevel_question_mark_scheme WHERE alevel_source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY source_page_start ASC, question_key ASC, sort_order ASC, alevel_question_mark_scheme_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alevel_question_mark_scheme ( alevel_question_id, alevel_source_file_id, question_key, mark_value, answer_summary_text, mark_scheme_text, mark_scheme_html, mark_scheme_json, source_page_start, source_page_end, source_bbox_json, raw_excerpt_hash, match_status, match_confidence, grading_mode, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{alevelQuestionId}, #{alevelSourceFileId}, #{questionKey}, #{markValue}, #{answerSummaryText}, #{markSchemeText}, #{markSchemeHtml}, #{markSchemeJson}, #{sourcePageStart}, #{sourcePageEnd}, #{sourceBboxJson}, #{rawExcerptHash}, #{matchStatus}, #{matchConfidence}, #{gradingMode}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_question_mark_scheme SET alevel_question_id = #{alevelQuestionId}, alevel_source_file_id = #{alevelSourceFileId}, question_key = #{questionKey}, mark_value = #{markValue}, answer_summary_text = #{answerSummaryText}, mark_scheme_text = #{markSchemeText}, mark_scheme_html = #{markSchemeHtml}, mark_scheme_json = #{markSchemeJson}, source_page_start = #{sourcePageStart}, source_page_end = #{sourcePageEnd}, source_bbox_json = #{sourceBboxJson}, raw_excerpt_hash = #{rawExcerptHash}, match_status = #{matchStatus}, match_confidence = #{matchConfidence}, grading_mode = #{gradingMode}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE alevel_question_mark_scheme_id = #{alevelQuestionMarkSchemeId}
